name: compliance closed-loop step sod-gate verifies the separation-of-duties gate fires on a critical-path commit
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step sod-gate --commit-stub author-equals-reviewer --critical-path-stub true 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'sod_gate=blocked' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
